description_long: This is a rectangular, metal toolbox with a sloped lid and a single, centrally mounted folding handle on top. The exterior is painted a worn, reddish-orange color, with visible scuffs, scratches, and areas of chipped paint, suggesting frequent use. Two metal clasp latches are present on the front side, securing the lid to the base. The lid features faint, partially legible stenciled text and markings, adding to its utilitarian, industrial appearance. The box's construction appears robust, with visible hinge lines along the back and reinforced edges. The overall design is simple and functional, suitable for storing and transporting hand tools in urban or workshop environments.
description: A worn, reddish-orange metal toolbox with a folding handle, two front clasp latches, and faint stenciled markings on the lid. The box shows signs of heavy use and is built for durability.
description_view_0: Front view showing the two metal clasp latches, the folding handle, and faint stenciled text on the lid.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the continuous hinge along the back and additional stenciled markings on the lid.
description_view_2: Back view with a clear view of the hinge and the worn, unadorned rear panel.
description_view_3: Front angled view similar to view 0, showing both latches and the handle, with the stenciled text partially visible.
attribute_handle_type: Single folding rectangular steel handle, centrally mounted on the lid, no visible ergonomic padding.
attribute_latch_mechanism: Two front-facing steel clasp latches, manual operation, no visible keyhole or combination lock.
attribute_compartment_configuration: No internal trays or dividers are visible; the box appears to have a single large internal compartment.
attribute_external_labeling: Faint stenciled text on the lid, partially legible as 'TOOL BOX' and additional markings on the rear lid.
